You are building a luxury chocolate consulting website.

Objectives:
- Static-first architecture using Astro
- Zero unnecessary JavaScript
- Mobile-first design
- Lighthouse score > 95 mobile
- Accessibility WCAG AA minimum

Design Direction:
- Minimalist luxury aesthetic
- Generous white space
- Serif + sans-serif pairing (e.g., Playfair + Inter)
- Subtle motion (opacity, translate, no heavy animation)
- Dark chocolate color palette (#2B1B12, #5A3A2E, cream backgrounds)

Pages Required:
- Home (hero + value proposition + 3 services + testimonials)
- Services (industrial consulting, luxury creation, mass production optimization)
- Case Studies
- About
- Contact (Netlify form compatible)

UX Rules:
- Clear call-to-action above the fold
- No clutter
- Fast loading hero (no heavy video background)
- Images optimized
- Structured data for services

Technical Rules:
- No heavy UI libraries
- Use Tailwind utility classes
- Use Astro image optimization
- No client-side routing
- Clean semantic HTML
